arts.ttl: Manchester United have a key tactical change to make without dropping a player
arts.sum: There are key selections for Erik ten Hag to make at centre back, in midfield and in attack this week, but also possibly at full back.

arts.ttl: How Manchester United should line up vs Southampton in Premier League fixture
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Samuel Luckhurst, Tyrone Marshall, Steven Railston)
arts.sum: Man Utd take on Southampton in the Premier League on Saturday and here's how our writers think they should line up.

arts.ttl: How Bruno Fernandes' name is really pronounced as Man Utd star reveals mistake
arts.sum: It has emerged how Bruno Fernandes' name should be pronounced almost five years after his arrival in the Premier League with Manchester United

arts.ttl: Paul Merson and Chris Sutton agree on Man United verdict as Erik ten Hag sent sack warning
arts.sum: Manchester United travel to Southampton in the Premier League looking to banish any doubts lingering over Erik ten Hag's future.

arts.ttl: 'I spoke to him' - what Erik ten Hag told Casemiro after Manchester United signed Manuel Ugarte
arts.sum: Man Utd signed Manuel Ugarte on deadline day and the £42m midfielder is set to take the place of Casemiro in Erik ten Hag's team.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Erik ten Hag warned over two signings as Donny van de Been speaks out
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag will be looking for a reaction for his side when they travel to Southampton off the back of a chastening loss to Liverpool before the international break

arts.ttl: FPL Gameweek 4 predicted line-ups: Southampton v Man United
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs for Southampton v Man United. The post FPL Gameweek 4 predicted line-ups: Southampton v Man United appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Southampton vs Man Utd: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Manchester United return from the September international break on Saturday lunchtime, travelling to newly-promoted Southampton in the Premier League. Man Utd's performance against Liverpool was deeply concerning but the Red Devils should have fewer issues against a Southampton side yet to earn a Premier League point.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag drops hint over Casemiro's Man United future amid January exit claims
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag insists that the Red Devils "need" Casemiro amid claims that the Brazilian could be sold by the Red Devils as early as January.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag confirms Casemiro stance ahead of Manuel Ugarte's Manchester United debut
arts.sum: Vastly experienced Brazilian hauled off at half-time in Liverpool loss
